scripts.dev:server: sh -c '(lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9) 2>/dev/null || true; cd server && go run ./cmd/api'
scripts.dev:client: sh -c 'until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:3001/health >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.3; done; npm run dev -w client'
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && cd server && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o bin/api ./cmd/api
